title: AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN SUMS UNDER REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-THREE HUNDRED ONE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4477 / 57 OG No. 14, 2458 (April 3, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2909, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN SUMS UNDER REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-THREE HUNDRED ONE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item 14 (

b

), page 530 of Republic Act Numbered Twenty-three hundred and one, is amended to read as follows:

"14. (

b

) Barrio school building, Sitio Saay, Barrio Can-asujan, Carcarâ

Construction of one room..................................... P4, 000.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
